tasks.subject: Task 1: Add consumable choice example to scene template
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a commented consumable choice example to `templates/scene.yaml`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `templates/scene.yaml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Template includes consumable choice block with `flags_unset` on `requires` and matching flag set on `effects`
- [ ] Comment explains the pattern in one line

**Verify:** Read `templates/scene.yaml` — consumable choice block is present.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/scene.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["consumable choice block present with flags_unset and effects", "one-line explanatory comment"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add consumable choice guidance to stage-1
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remind authors to flag one-shot choices during mechanics planning.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/storycrafting/stage-1-structure.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Mechanics Summary guidance includes consumable choice note
- [ ] Note explains the planning risk

**Verify:** Read `docs/storycrafting/stage-1-structure.md` — note present.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/storycrafting/stage-1-structure.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["consumable choice note in mechanics planning section"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add consumable choice and NPC voice guidance to stage-3
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add YAML example and NPC voice section to stage-3 scene writing doc.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/storycrafting/stage-3-scene-writing.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Consumable choice YAML example in scene quality checks
- [ ] NPC voice section with register, consistency, voice-as-mechanic guidance

**Verify:** Read `docs/storycrafting/stage-3-scene-writing.md` — both present.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/storycrafting/stage-3-scene-writing.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["consumable choice YAML example in quality checks", "NPC voice section present"]}
```
